content_body: Established in October 2019, South of North is dedicated to delivering the highest quality Asian inspired dishes using premium ingredients combined with unexpected flavors for an unforgettable experience. Serving up a chef-driven twist on Asian Fusion Fare with Vietnameseinfluence. Experience 5-star food and dining at South of North! Reservations required Thursday-Saturday 4:30-7:30pm; email southofnorthblueridge@gmail.com or reach out to them on social media!
title: South of North
